description_long: This is a pair of tall, round wooden stools with turned spindle legs and circular seats, crafted in a traditional style. Each stool features four slender legs connected by multiple horizontal rungs, providing both structural support and a place to rest feet. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, highlighting the natural grain and giving the stools a rustic yet refined appearance. The legs and rungs are intricately shaped with decorative turning, adding visual interest and a handcrafted feel. The seats are flat and smooth, designed for comfortable sitting, and the stools are lightweight enough to be easily moved. These stools are suitable for use in public spaces such as cafes, bars, or communal urban areas.
description: A pair of tall, round wooden stools with turned spindle legs and circular seats, finished in a warm brown wood with decorative shaping.
description_view_0: Two wooden stools, one upright and one lying on its side, showing the round seat, turned legs, and connecting rungs.
description_view_1: Front view of the upright stool with the other stool on its side, highlighting the symmetry and decorative leg turning.
description_view_2: Rear angle showing the underside of the stools, emphasizing the circular seat base and the network of connecting rungs.
description_view_3: Side view with one stool upright and the other on its side, displaying the full length of the legs and the smooth seat surface.
